# Swiftbanq Credit Solutions

> Digital lending, SME financing, Asset Loans, and Treasury Services.

Swiftbanq is a duly Licensed money lending institution operating under the regulatory framework of the Lagos State Money Lenders Law in Nigeria.

## Core Services

- **SME Financing**: Local Purchase Orders (LPO), Invoice Discounting Facility (IDF), Bridge & Contract Finance, Project Finance & Syndication.
- **Asset Financing**: Fleet & Vehicle Financing, Office Equipment Loans, Household Equipment, Specialized Machinery.
- **Digital Lending**: Instant Disbursement, Flexible Repayment, No Hidden Charges, Paperless Application.
- **Treasury Services**: Term Deposits, Institutional Borrowing, Yield Maximization, Safe Vehicles.

## Security & Regulation

Secure by design, regulated in Nigeria. We operate strictly within the regulatory frameworks set forth by the Central Bank of Nigeria and the Lagos State Money Lenders Law. NDPR Compliant.
